description: Create a tile floor layout drawing for a commercial restroom in LibreCAD (Unit: mm, Origin: 0,0). The drawing must include a 'WALLS' layer with a rectangle from (0, 0) to (3000, 2400) and a red 'BORDER' layer with a rectangle from (150, 150) to (2850, 2250). On a cyan 'TILES' layer, draw a 300x300mm grid with vertical lines at x = 450, 750, ..., 2550 (from y=150 to 2250) and horizontal lines at y = 450, 750, ..., 1950 (from x=150 to 2850). Include a 'DIMENSIONS' layer for the room width (3000) and height (2400), and a 'TEXT' layer with the label "RESTROOM TILE LAYOUT - SCALE 1:20" below the drawing. Save the final drawing to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/restroom_tile_layout.dxf.
